---
title: "Anna"
date: 2023/7/15
format: html
css: styles.css
categories: 
- mentorship
- UNR

---
<img src="../images/mentor1.jpg" width="300" height="300">

I mentored Anna Dlabalova. She received a NURA scholarship, conducted an independent project, and published a paper in an undergraduate journal based on her work in our lab.
